name: Victoria
desc: Once per turn: You can target 1 Dragon-Type monster in your opponent's Graveyard; Special Summon that target to your side of the field. Your opponent cannot target face-up Fairy-Type monsters for attacks, except this one.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 Dragon-Type monster in your opponent's Graveyard; Special Summon that target to your side of the field. Your opponent cannot target face-up Fairy-Type monsters for attacks, except this one.
eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 Dragon-Type monster in your opponent's Graveyard; Special Summon that target to your side of the field. Your opponent cannot target face-up Fairy-Type monsters for attacks, except this one.

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
